title: GPT-5.4 mini is available today in ChatGPT, Codex, and the API. Optimized for coding, computer use, multimodal understanding, and subagents. And it’s 2x faster than GPT-5 mini. https://openai.com/index/introducing-gpt-5-4-mini-and-nano/
